_comment: Sample payload Replit sends to Claude /api/mine endpoint. Fields sourced from brands table + user input at time of submit.

brand.name: AnswerMonk
brand.whatItIs: AnswerMonk is a GEO intelligence platform that helps brands understand and improve how they appear in AI-powered search engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.

targetUser.demographic: Marketing managers and brand owners at mid-market companies
targetUser.context: Noticing traffic shifts from traditional SEO to AI search, unsure how to adapt
targetUser.painPoint: No visibility into whether their brand appears in AI answers — or how competitors are positioned
targetUser.psychographic: Data-driven, growth-oriented, early adopters of MarTech

brand.positioning: AnswerMonk helps brands measure and improve their presence in AI-generated answers — the new search battlefield.

_field_sources.brand.name: brands.brandName
_field_sources.keywords.seeds: User-edited at submit time — pre-filled from brands.primaryKeywords
_field_sources.modes: User choice: Quick = nano+trending, Full = all 4
